# Shiraz Ali

> Shiraz Ali is a Full Stack Developer and Agentic AI Engineer based in Karachi, Pakistan, building production-grade web applications and multi-agent AI systems.

Shiraz is the Lead Developer at Ziybex, a creative marketing and web agency, where he delivers full-stack solutions and AI-integrated marketing tools for clients. He specializes in multi-agent AI systems with real-world deployments (WhatsApp, Gmail, cron pipelines), full-stack apps on Google Cloud Run, Vercel, and Docker, and agentic AI infrastructure including MCP servers and the ACP protocol. He holds a BSc in Artificial Intelligence from SMIU and is pursuing Cloud Native Agentic AI Engineering at PIAIC. He is also the founder of CodePulse Innovations and creator of FolioGenerator.com, an AI-driven portfolio generation platform.

## Links

- [Portfolio](https://shirazabubakar.vercel.app): Personal portfolio website
- [GitHub](https://github.com/shirazkk): Open-source projects and code
- [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/shirazali8): Professional profile and experience
- [Agency](https://ziybex.com): Ziybex creative marketing & web agency

## Skills

- Frontend: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
- AI & Agentic Systems: Anthropic, OpenAI, Google Gemini, LangChain, CrewAI, MCP
- Backend & Infrastructure: FastAPI, Python, Node.js, Docker, Google Cloud Run, Vercel
- Databases: PostgreSQL, Supabase, MySQL
- Tools: Git, Figma, Playwright

## Experience

- Lead Developer at Ziybex (Present): Full-stack web solutions and AI-integrated marketing tools for clients including luxury event companies and real estate venues
- Frontend Development Intern at DevelopersHub Corporation (Mar–Jul 2025): Built responsive e-commerce platforms and networking apps with AI chatbot integration using Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind, and Shadcn
- Founder of CodePulse Innovations: Built and launched FolioGenerator.com, an AI-driven resume-to-portfolio website generator

## Achievements

- GDG Kolachi Hackathon Winner — Bus Kahan Hai? (real-time bus tracker)
- Google AI Seekho 2026 — Ustaad.ai (multi-agent tutoring platform)
- Panaversity Hackathon — Personal AI Employee (Digital FTE)
- Certifications: Anthropic Claude, Hugging Face, Microsoft/LinkedIn, Cisco/ITU-DTC, Huawei HCIA-IoT, AI Python for Beginners (DeepLearning.AI), React.js (HackerRank), Introduction to TypeScript (Great Learning)
